'''Brakko Gaz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who lived during the final [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Gaz initially worked for [[Groff Haugg]], the owner of [[Haugg Nerf Industries]]. While working for Haugg on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Gaz was identified as the triggerman in the murder of several business owners.

The [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] placed a bounty on his head for the murders with a reward of 1,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for his capture alive and 500 credits dead. By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Gaz had fled to [[Outland Transit Station|Outland Station]], where he managed to find work as a guard for crime boss [[Meeko Ghintee]]. Whilst on the station, he ran into the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who was after Ghintee's bounty. Gaz fired his personal [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] at Fett while his [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] cohorts rushed him. Fett, who had been informed of the bounty on Gaz, captured him alive for 1,000 credits.

==Behind the scenes==
In the video game, ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', Brakko Gaz is the third or fourth of five possible secondary bounties that a player can secure in the pit fighters arena section in Chapter One. Players have the option of taking him alive or killing him; however, as Gaz is worth 1,000 credits alive and only 500 credits dead, this article assumes that Fett took the bounty alive for a higher reward.

==Appearances==
